title: NowhereToBeSeen
description: Hide every piece of information about who's online
body:
## NowhereToBeSeen
<BIG>**Hide every piece of information about who's online**</BIG>

**What it does currently:**
- Remove the Tab/Player list
- Hide Name tag

⚠ It does not remove join message, use another mod to do that.

[![Modrint](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/nowheretobeseen.svg "Cursforge download")](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nowheretobeseen "CurseForge")
